profile.name: Abhishek Kalyan
profile.experience: 9+ years in Customer Support and Operations Leadership

operations_experience: Handled 40–60 customer cases daily while maintaining strict policy compliance
Maintained 99–100% quality score through SOP adherence
Handled more than 12,000 escalation contacts across calls, emails, and chats
Supported 95%+ SLA adherence during peak operational volumes
Worked with SQL and Power BI dashboards for operational reporting
Uses AWS console tools to monitor operational workflows

projects.name: Project Velocity
projects.description: Reduced operational backlog by 35 percent and delivered approximately $280K in cost savings through workflow optimization and backlog management improvements.

projects.name: Project Sigma
projects.description: Reduced policy deviation rates by 18 percent, improving operational consistency and generating approximately $320K in savings.

projects.name: Project Nexus
projects.description: Reduced onboarding ramp time by 30 percent by optimizing training structure and operational readiness programs.

projects.name: Global Centralized Advisor Pool Launch
projects.description: Helped launch a centralized global advisor model where advisors are pooled instead of assigned to individual teams. This system routes associate questions to the first available advisor globally, significantly improving response efficiency and advisor utilization. The system has remained active and operational for over two years.

fun_facts: Abhishek believes that the best operational leaders are the ones who can simplify complexity into repeatable processes.
Abhishek enjoys turning chaotic workflows into structured systems that scale across large teams.
Abhishek often treats backlog management like solving a strategy puzzle — prioritizing impact over volume.
Abhishek believes strong teams are built through mentorship and clear operational frameworks.
